git.name: check_git_all
git.description: Runs all enabled Git commit quality checks and returns a combined report covering commit format and content anti-patterns.

features.name: check_git_commit_content
features.description: Validates commit message body for content anti-patterns: no bullet lists, no file paths, no counts, no enumerated properties, no 'Key features:' sections, no sensitive information.

features.name: check_git_commit_format
features.description: Validates commit message formatting against Conventional Commits: type(scope): description, subject under 50 characters, body wrap at 72 characters, blank line between subject and body.

editorconfig.name: get_editorconfig
editorconfig.description: Resolves effective .editorconfig properties for a given file path by walking the directory tree, evaluating glob patterns and section cascading, and returning final key-value pairs.
